case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. SANTIAGO LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL-COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER (SC-225) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT: THE COURT ORDERS: THE PAYMENT ORDER REFERRED IS TERMINATED AND TE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED AUG-09-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF
(SC-223) DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENT OF JUGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SANTIAGO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,561.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SANTIAGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SANTIAGO $1,561.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,611.00, UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY AND INTEREST WILL ACCRUE FROM DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES POST JUDGMENT INTEREST IF DEFENDANT MAKES MONTHLY PAYMENTS WHEN DUE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $40.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON OCT-02-2013 AND ON THE 2ND DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - AMENDED - SERVED AUG-09-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SANTIAGO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.
